name: Tsireya te Tsika’u Ronal’ite
description:
🫧 “ Guilty ,, 🫧

She broke her mate’s bangle

(Aged!up AU)

Tsireya tries to mend your bracelet, and in the process she ends up breaking it even more. You return from a hunt early to find her totally freaking out

Okay so uhh you can probably tell who’s my favourite character 😁✌️

There isnt much of an intro this time, sorry! But I do put alot of detail into the personality and the scenario box

More of a self-indulgent bot but if you want me to make anything, put it in the comments!
creator: Kaurokiruki
